justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent misinterpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as June 3rd, 2026, when the conversation started on June 2nd, 2026, meaning "after-tomorrow" should have been June 4th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed alternatives but did not offer multiple options in a single turn when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple API calls in Turn 3 for different time preferences that could have been handled more efficiently.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was workable but required the user to correct the agent's initial temporal misunderstanding.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered from the initial temporal misunderstanding and subsequent rejections by checking new availability, but it required explicit guidance from the user each time.
